rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption has no relation to Educ. Code §7.052, which governs the commissioner's term of office. No conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 7.052. TERM OF OFFICE. The commissioner serves a term of office of four years commensurate with the term of the governor.
_note: Rule text is unrelated to the proposed change; no conflict detected.
